text: Define the fundable prototype: an open Git-native intent and dependency protocol
description: Specify the new six-month project independently from the existing app. Candidate deliverables: versioned open schema for aims/dependencies/rationale/provenance; Git-native CLI and validation tooling; aim-to-commit evidence; interoperable import/export; reference integration in Aimparency; documentation and examples for other open-source projects. Explain why this is reusable software infrastructure, how it improves user sovereignty around AI agents, and what technical uncertainty makes it a prototype rather than routine product work.

status.comment: A bounded, independently fundable protocol/tooling scope is drafted and source-checked; ready for founder review and external validation.

reflection: Created meta/applications/prototype-fund-2026/scope.md. It distinguishes the existing Aimparency baseline from new funded work and specifies five deliverables: versioned protocol, standalone CLI, local intent-to-implementation provenance, interoperability toolkit, and external validation/docs. Includes technical uncertainties, six-month sequence, explicit exclusions, public value, and measurable success criteria. Checked official Prototype Fund pages on 2026-07-20: software infrastructure, societal value, open availability, modularity/interoperability, and October-November 2026 window.
